title: passerina drakensbergensis
intro: Passerina drakensbergensis, also known as the Drakensberg Passerina, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It has medicinal properties due to its iridoid glycosides and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, and is also used to treat digestive issues and fever. In herbal preparations, Passerina drakensbergensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
